h4effbd3eg4909g4159ga529g7b4491d69646: Bloody hells - literally. Just when I think I've got a grasp on our dilemma, a devil shows up...
ha5407a1bg599dg4e71gadb9g443b57a4f9fb: No matter. We've dealt with every other oddity thrown at us lately - we can handle this one too.
h5405d4a3gdfe4g4aa9gb580g04b85aa19c51: He knows our secret, he claims he can help... what do you make of him?
h452b9d2bg8cfcg4801g87efgdf2049090885: Help is help, no matter the source.
hb0c7c09bgb766g4fc9g8e3ag2bec7ff482ff: Oh you were tempted, were you? Interesting.
hb5d4a6e4g355eg4bc1g81acg152e1bbbf27e: What grabbed you, exactly? His parlour tricks? His manners? The lavish spread, even?
h605117adg2c18g412eg905fg4e5a22979fdb: You must have found something alluring, to overlook the fact he was a devil.
hb061c0d7g2b24g4061ga7c7g893df42da0f9: If Raphael can truly offer help, we have to at least consider it.
h445d6292g4f20g4039g9307g5760ca80cdc0: I'm still unsure. He could be a help to us, or not.
h3a365309g862cg4a98gac52g08fc55b028e1: You know, failing to make a decision is the same as making a decision...
heeda9e94gb270g4736gbf4fged2d7d1ab927: Actually, if Raphael can truly offer help, maybe we should consider it.
h22ec3d39g80d9g403ag8ac4g52b79e75e5b6: All right. Perhaps we shouldn't trust Raphael. He is a devil, after all.

h71018c75gd8eeg4d1ag942cg793e09e25d78: What's your point exactly? Spit it out.
h3fa5ddb6g0e3dg4126gb38eg39501986b7e6: My point is that Raphael was stirring the pot - trying to unsettle us.
h9cd2e655g9481g4b5aga057g21232b620bcb: Hmm. Or is it? Suddenly I'm not so sure...
hf9cae480gbf06g4fb6gb2ccg72eb1c840a53: ... isn't it terrible when someone causes you to doubt yourself?
h7b2518e6gd806g4e03gb316g6db102887539: I've changed my mind. Perhaps we should trust Raphael.
h654c891bg0d2cg4a7bgb731g8b3ddc8dabf0: Your opinions are easily swayed. Should I wait for them to change again?
h7a9553ccg0b56g496eg99degaf785122324b: No. My mind is made up.
hce607933gcf9ag41c7g8ea9g2077d095d65b: Perhaps you're right. Perhaps a devil has our best interests at heart and wants nothing in return.
h54c97b8cg308cg4003g8508g53f4cbadf7ac: We could throw ourselves at his feet - be they cloven or otherwise. Or perhaps we shouldn't.
h10fddceag3bbfg46a9g8aa9g4655e2ddac18: My mind is settled. Raphael could be just the friend we need.
he45c05e9gaa29g4776g9172ga7200a4d1b9b: Your gullibility would be endearing, if it didn't lead us into danger.
h28a20ba1g822cg4dafg849dg2989b5dd7190: You're twisting my words - trying to manipulate me.

h3e8b5c2ag0f01g418fgb626g9764c9436d02: I've changed my mind. We shouldn't trust Raphael.
hf3554b23ga834g49fega2b2g4a18bdb3651a: Use your shared connection. See what she's really thinking.
h996c37fcg48a7g460egbc18g6e38ecdc1a4b: Seems like you have a particular point you want to make about Raphael.
h01f62f19g8238g4aeaga90fgcfba0cdd778e: Actually... yes, you're right. Very intuitive. Clearly the devil was trying to sow doubt among us.
hf7d0cf5cge91ag4f83gb682g293be56fe3b7: He's clever. My order uses the same tactic when dealing with enemies of Shar.
h39c66efbg3344g4cf4g9215gceb13d1c8df1: You don't need a scourge or a rack to break people. Fear and self-doubt are sufficient.
h173bb5f2g2222g4aeagb769g22f211c8337e: When actual pain comes, the victim's already done the heavy lifting for their torturer.
ha09c7690g486fg4ec4g9d56g3ed79cde038b: There were no right answers with that devil. He was toying with his food - us.
hf584d0c3g7cbfg4f9dgad92g75aabf5fce2e: I'm glad I made the right decision then.
h7f4164d8g8433g425agbf8bg7e650695a251: See? Sowing doubt is an old trick. Watch out for it. And for Raphael.

h46979239g133dg4204ga978g0de1699e7d52: There are many. But they all renounce their gods when they are taught fear.
hca4e5224g3df0g49a2ga393gce7dd4d09a49: I didn't realise you were so... well-versed in mental and emotional torment.
h562b74adg5428g4378g81e4gc7a6968d24a6: And aren't you glad that I am?
h6a78fdaegf954g42c4gb973g086cab68f29c: It's an effective trick. Watch out for it. And for Raphael.
h4600c1c8g1efcg4f7dg892bga14503c72344: I think I detected a note of admiration in your voice.
he0c97910g70f2g41c5g8813g82eb441fe3fa: I respect his craft. As should you.
h05e8abbag2322g42abg8685gffbcdc38df58: I know people who work much like our new acquaintance does.
he3801f67gbbf0g4f2dg9d5ag2e2e0b12712b: ...agh! I can feel you - get out of my head!
h2b8ab6d8g7e41g46a7gbf09gf87629ef8d88: I don't know what's worse. A devil or a prying leader.
h143c42cfga6c3g40f3g9ca7g0ef7a6bd5165: I expect we'll be parting company very soon.

ha16a9c6dg264bg4f8fgbfd6g92df9d935bbc: And watch out for Raphael. He's better at getting into people's heads than you are, you ass.
hebeed0b2g3e15g45b0gb2dbg012fdca57664: You're obviously toying with me. Stop it.

h51416d90g22bbg42b1gad6egc2b315c10a02: Actually, I've changed my mind. A devil such as Raphael can't truly be trusted.
h4d15cbf9gb5afg4c00g9d16ge71496bf99e6: I must admit, I'm feeling less sure all of a sudden.
h7863d129g6344g46ddg83ffg0fb0b1ca1ff1: I've made you doubt yourself. Sorry, not what I intended.

h240ae673g2eb0g49c7ga407ga9ab85faf1f2: I'm not going to just change my mind. We can't trust Raphael.

h9ac6e985g5facg4b42g9766g722bfe5be4f8: I suppose it was a lot to take in. A devil sought us out, teased us with his help...
